themes.theme_description: Users feel recommendations stagnate despite changing listening behavior and exploring new genres
themes.representative_quote: My Discover Weekly has been recommending the same type of songs for months now

themes.theme_description: Users trapped in narrow genre bubbles, unable to discover music across different styles
themes.representative_quote: I'm stuck in an indie rock bubble. I listen to other genres too but Spotify only recommends variations of the same thing

themes.theme_description: Repeated bad suggestions have eroded user confidence in the algorithm over time
themes.representative_quote: I've given Discover Weekly so many chances and it keeps disappointing. Trust is gone.

themes.theme_description: Algorithm ignores situational and emotional context for music selection
themes.representative_quote: I'm trying to study and Spotify recommends high-energy dance tracks

themes.theme_description: Too many playlists and options lead to decision fatigue and defaulting to familiar music
themes.representative_quote: I open the app wanting to find something new and I'm hit with 50 different playlists

themes.theme_description: Discovery surfaces are hard to find, navigate, or use within the app interface
themes.representative_quote: Where did the Discover tab go? I can't find any way to actively browse new music anymore

themes.theme_description: Algorithm doesn't understand WHY users listen to certain songs, mixing contexts
themes.representative_quote: I listened to baby shark for my kid and now my entire recommendation feed is children's music

themes.theme_description: Users discover music through friends and social media rather than the algorithm
themes.representative_quote: I discover most of my music from friends and TikTok, not from Spotify

data.need: Better handling of shared accounts and mixed listening
Social discovery features that actually work
A surprise me button for spontaneous discovery
Better feedback mechanism to tell the algorithm what I like
